observations: Scaffold verified: init.sh, feature_list.json, project_specs.xml, bootstrap.ts present.
API healthy at localhost:3099 (container PORT=5171, OSS runtime).
Fresh tenant via POST /v1/auth/register → 201; incident via POST /v1/incidents → 201; remediation via POST /api/v1/remediation → 201.
GET /api/v1/remediation/d5c39b9e-2233-477d-b125-6d551243dc2c/proposal → HTTP 200 with steps ecs.updateService + ssm.runCommand (2 AWS actions).
POST /api/v1/remediation/:id/approve with admin JWT → HTTP 200, status=approved, approvedBy=qa-ac023-*@example.com.
Second POST /api/v1/remediation/:id/approve → HTTP 409 CONFLICT (status completed after auto-execute; duplicate approval rejected).
ApprovalEntity creation confirmed via code audit: approve-remediation.usecase.ts calls approvalRepo.create(); bootstrap.ts wires PgApprovalRepository into ApproveRemediationUseCase.
